articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

articles.headline: Martínez: Cristiano Ronaldo sets the example for Portugal

images.caption: Roberto Martínez says Cristiano Ronaldo is not thinking about his Portugal future beyond the World Cup.

article.headline: Modric helps Croatia beat Ronaldo-less Portugal in friendly
article.description: Goals in each half by Luka Modric and Ante Budimir got Croatia a historic first win over Portugal in eight matches when they beat the hosts 2-1 in an international friendly on Saturday, as Cristiano Ronaldo remained on the bench.
article.linkText: Modric helps Croatia beat Ronaldo-less Portugal

article.story:
Goals in each half by Luka Modric and Ante Budimir got Croatia a historic first win over Portugal in eight matches when they beat the hosts 2-1 in an international friendly on Saturday, as Cristiano Ronaldo remained on the bench.

Vitinha brought down Mateo Kovacic in the box soon after kick-off, resulting in a penalty. Portugal keeper Diogo Costa rightly guessed where Modric would aim, but his dive to the right fell just short as the Real Madrid midfielder scored his 25th goal for Croatia.

But half-time substitute Diogo Jota brought Portugal level three minutes after coming on, when fellow substitute Nelson Semedo found him inside the six-yard box with a short cross from the right. The Liverpool forward made no mistake with the close-range finish.

But Croatia restored their lead eight minutes later, despite Costa's best efforts as he did well to deflect Budimir's attempt to the crossbar. The rebound went right back to Budimir who headed it into the net with ease.

Ronaldo joined Portugal on Friday after finishing his club campaign with Al Nassr in Saudi Arabia. The 39-year-old is set to make a record sixth appearance at the European Championship. Men's international soccer's all-time leading scorer with 128 goals, Ronaldo helped Portugal win the European title in 2016.

Portugal, who won six of their previous seven matches against Croatia, begin their Euro 2024 Group F campaign against Czechia on June 18. Croatia face Spain in their first Group B fixture next Saturday. 

Information from Reuters and The Associated Press contributed to this report.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Portugal 0, Croatia 1. Luka Modric (Croatia) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Ante Budimir (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Portugal 0, Croatia 1.
Substitution, Portugal. João Cancelo replaces Nuno Mendes.
Substitution, Portugal. Diogo Jota replaces Gonçalo Ramos.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces João Félix.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Diogo Dalot.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Croatia 1. Diogo Jota (Portugal) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Nélson Semedo.
Substitution, Croatia. Ivan Perisic replaces Andrej Kramaric.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Lovro Majer.
Substitution, Croatia. Luka Sucic replaces Luka Modric.
Goal!  Portugal 1, Croatia 2. Ante Budimir (Croatia) header from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Marcelo Brozovic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Croatia. Bruno Petkovic replaces Ante Budimir.
Substitution, Portugal. Pedro Neto replaces Bruno Fernandes.
Substitution, Croatia. Nikola Vlasic replaces Marcelo Brozovic.
Substitution, Croatia. Luka Ivanusec replaces Mateo Kovacic.
João Cancelo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Portugal. Matheus Nunes replaces Vitinha.
Luka Ivanusec (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Portugal 1, Croatia 2.
